prompt: Edit image 1: Apply the vibrant orange and yellow infrared color palette and detailed ring structure from image 3 to the galaxy. Use the high-contrast mask information from image 2 to emphasize these colors and structures within the core region.

Use the high-contrast white mask from image 2 to precisely guide and emphasize these applied colors and structures within the galaxy's central and main body.
objects: Vibrant orange and yellow infrared color palette (on the galaxy)
